title: 专业精神 / Professionalism
point: 持续进修保持胜任,只在能力范围内执业。 / Maintain competence via CPD; act within your competence.
keyfacts: 超能力→转介 / Beyond competence → refer

title: 态度 / Attitude
point: 勤勉、诚信、负责,以客户利益为重。 / Diligence, integrity and accountability, serving the client.
keyfacts: 维护行业声誉 / Protect the profession’s reputation
